name: Accessible Transit Svc
recent_news: No public news found; small Las Vegas paratransit/accessibility transport operator with minimal web footprint.
fit_notes: Very small (~10 employees, ~$700K rev) Las Vegas accessibility transport with no confirmed school-bus or SPED contract activity; appears to be an NEMT/paratransit micro-operator, not a clear Summit tuck-in fit.

name: Las Vegas Transportation Inc
recent_news: No public news, website, or coverage found tied to phone (702) 248-2831; entity has no detectable web presence as a student transportation operator.
fit_notes: Generic name with no online footprint; Clark County (CCSD) self-operates its school transport and Nevada limo/taxi/livery directories did not match this entity. Unverifiable as an independent school-bus operator; low priority unless ground-truthed.

name: Pacs Transportation
owner_or_parent: Pennyrile Allied Community Services, Inc. (PACS) — community action agency
districts_or_customers: Christian, Trigg, Todd, Hopkins, Muhlenberg, Caldwell, Crittenden, Lyon, Livingston counties (KY)
recent_news: Operates as the transportation arm of Pennyrile Allied Community Services (PACS-KY), a nonprofit community action agency; no school-bus contract activity identified.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target — this is the transportation program of a 501(c)(3) community action agency (PACS-KY) providing public/Medicaid/senior rides, not an independent private school-bus contractor; not acquirable for Summit.

name: Para Tran Medical Transport
districts_or_customers: Door County Medical Center (former 30+ year partner)
recent_news: Owner Wayne Denil (73, retired 40-yr critical-care paramedic) suspended services; Door County Medical Center publicly announced it had to 'move on from Para-Tran' and transition transfers to Door County EMS and County Rescue (Green Bay); company effectively wound down.
fit_notes: NOT a fit — Para Tran is/was a private ambulance company (not school bus or SPED), and the owner has wound down operations after losing the hospital contract. Defunct/transitioning out; no school-transport assets to acquire.

name: Patient's Express
owner_or_parent: independent (Patients' Express LLC — Tami & Jeff Bowe)
districts_or_customers: Chippewa Valley patients (incl. trips to Rochester MN and Minneapolis)
recent_news: No M&A or news activity found; small family LLC operating wheelchair-lift NEMT runs from Chippewa Falls.
fit_notes: Family-owned NEMT/medical transport LLC, not a school-bus or SPED student-transport contractor; pure-play medical transport with no school-district business identified. Not a Summit tuck-in fit.
